---
title: "Major Road Database"
---

## Overview

The Major Road Database (MRDB) provides road geometry and classification context
for major roads. In this project it supports spatial joins, road hierarchy
checks, and validation against OS Open Roads.

::: {.callout-note}
This page is a placeholder for the public documentation site.
:::

## Role In The Pipeline

- Provides major-road geometry for spatial matching and cross-checks.
- Helps contextualise motorway and A-road corridors.
- Supports road-class and corridor-level validation.

## Planned Content

- Source and download instructions.
- Fields used by the project.
- Relationship to OS Open Roads.
- Known limitations and geometry differences.
